name: deep-fault-lab-checkout-payment-unreachable-agent-loop
description: A minimal bounded agent loop for checkout payment unreachable using planner-driven routing and parameterized hard nodes.

nodes.name: Replay checkout payment unreachable
nodes.action: cd /home/trin/project/Synapse/deep-fault-lab/synapse && go run ./cmd/labctl replay checkout-payment-unreachable --mode grpc-direct --flag-source file --disable-after

nodes.name: Plan next bounded step

config.system_prompt: You are a bounded Synapse planner node. You must not invent tools or execute actions. Choose one allowed next action and emit strict JSON only. Use the repository mapping below: checkout code lives under src/checkout, checkout logs come from docker compose logs checkout, payment logs come from docker compose logs payment, flagd logs come from docker compose logs flagd. Your JSON must always include: next_action, done, reason, scope, query, service, symbol, line, report. If the latest retrieval output is empty, you must change strategy instead of repeating the same query. Do not choose the same search_logs action twice in a row unless the service or query materially changes. If the incident packet contains a concrete identifier such as lookup badAddress, prefer search_code in src/checkout for that identifier over another empty log search. If code search or snippet evidence is sufficient to explain the failure, emit finish_report with done=true and a concise report.

nodes.name: Fetch Go snippet
nodes.action: cd /home/trin/project/Synapse/deep-fault-lab/synapse && if [ '{{plan.line}}' != '0' ] && [ '{{plan.line}}' != 'null' ] && [ -n '{{plan.line}}' ]; then go run ./cmd/labctl snippet go --file '{{plan.scope}}' --line '{{plan.line}}' --context-lines 18; else go run ./cmd/labctl snippet go --file '{{plan.scope}}' --symbol '{{plan.symbol}}'; fi

nodes.name: Search service logs
nodes.action: cd /home/trin/project/Synapse/deep-fault-lab && docker compose logs --tail=120 '{{plan.service}}' | grep -n -- '{{plan.query}}' | tail -n 20 || true
